company.name: Rocking (PTY) LTD
company.registeredOffice: Unit A3, Westlake Square, Westlake Drive, Westlake, 7945, South Africa

doc.projectIntro: This quote covers the supply of the Cisco Catalyst network hardware requested by Lorenz Group IT for the Compact Foods site (Muizenberg): two Catalyst 8200L edge routers, a Catalyst 9200L 48-port 10G-uplink core switch, and a Catalyst 9200CX 12-port compact switch — each with 24×7×4 SmartNet support and a 3-year Cisco DNA Essentials licence. Supply only — installation and configuration are quoted separately. All prices exclude VAT (15%).

items.detail: 1-NIM slot, 4×1G WAN ports · edge router (×2 for primary + secondary)

doc.summaryNote: Supply only — installation and configuration are quoted separately. Pricing is subject to exchange-rate movement and OEM price changes until order confirmation.
terms: This quote is valid for 14 days from the date of issue.
All prices exclude VAT at 15% unless otherwise stated.
Supply only — installation and configuration are quoted separately.
Pricing is subject to exchange-rate movement and OEM price changes, and is confirmed at order placement.
Payment is due in full prior to order placement.
Delivery lead time is subject to Cisco/OEM stock availability.
Hardware remains the property of Rocking until paid in full.

banking.branch: Blue Route Mall, Tokai Road, Tokai, 7945
banking.reference: Please use quote number as payment reference.
